scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp src/index.html src/styles.css dist/ && rm -rf dist/build && tsc --project tsconfig.json && cp dist/build/src/app.js dist/app.js && rm -rf dist/build
scripts.build-desktop: mkdir -p dist/desktop && cp desktop/index.html desktop/styles.css dist/desktop/ && tsc --project tsconfig.desktop.json
